POST /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}.description: Creates feature flag configuration for the specified application platform.

PATCH /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}.description: Updates feature flag values for the specified platform. Only included flags are modified.

PUT /v1/app-config/feature-flags/{app}.description: Replaces the entire feature flag configuration for the specified platform.

POST /v1/auth/register.description: Registers a new user account with Firebase credentials and creates the corresponding platform profile.

POST /v1/avm/.description: Runs an automated valuation model (AVM) for a property address. Returns estimated value based on comparables, market trends, and property data.

GET /v1/broadcast/.description: Returns all broadcast messages with optional filtering by status and type.

POST /v1/broadcast/create.description: Creates a new broadcast message for sending to a targeted audience via email, SMS, or push notification.

GET /v1/broadcast/read/{id}.description: Retrieves a single broadcast message by ID including delivery status and recipient details.

PATCH /v1/broadcast/{id}.description: Updates a broadcast message. Only draft broadcasts can be modified.

POST /v1/brokerages/associate/{companyId.description: Links a brokerage to a HubSpot company record.

POST /v1/brokerages/get-associate.description: Retrieves the brokerage-to-company association for a given brokerage or company.

GET /v1/brokerages/public.description: Returns publicly visible brokerage records for use in agent-facing UIs and directories.

PATCH /v1/brokerages/{companyId}.description: Updates brokerage fields using the associated HubSpot company ID.

GET /v1/brokerages/{companyId}.description: Retrieves a brokerage record by its associated HubSpot company ID.

POST /v1/case-studies/search.description: Searches published case studies by address, deal type, or profit range.

GET /v1/contacts/dashboard.description: Returns aggregated contact metrics and summary data for the admin dashboard.

POST /v1/contacts/edge-view.description: Generates an Edge (agent-facing property report) view link for a contact.

POST /v1/contacts/invite.description: Sends an invitation to a contact to view their property report or schedule an onsite visit.

POST /v1/contacts/merge.description: Merges two duplicate contact records into one, combining associated deals and history.

POST /v1/contacts/remove-from-deal.description: Removes the association between a contact and a deal.

GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}/edge-view.description: Retrieves the Edge (agent-facing report) view data for a contact.

GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}/homes.description: Returns all home records associated with a contact.

GET /v1/contacts/{contactId}/referrals.description: Returns referral records associated with a contact.

PATCH /v1/contractors/.description: Updates multiple contractor records in a single request.

POST /v1/contractors/associate/{companyI.description: Links a contractor to a HubSpot company record.

POST /v1/contractors/atlist.description: Returns contractors available for assignment based on location, specialty, and availability.

POST /v1/contractors/get-association.description: Retrieves the contractor-to-company association for a given contractor or company.

POST /v1/contractors/import.description: Bulk imports contractor records from a CSV or structured data payload.

GET /v1/contractors/opportunity/{opportu.description: Retrieves the contractor assigned to a specific opportunity.

POST /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/file.description: Uploads a document (license, insurance, W-9, etc.) to a contractor's profile.

DELETE /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/fi.description: Deletes a specific document type from a contractor's profile.

PATCH /v1/contractors/{contractorId}/set.description: Sets the primary contact person for a contractor company.

GET /v1/contracts/download/{contractId}.description: Downloads a contract document as a PDF file.

GET /v1/contracts/edit-session/{contract.description: Creates or retrieves an edit session for a contract document.

GET /v1/contracts/send-for-signature/{co.description: Sends a contract to all recipients for e-signature via PandaDoc.

GET /v1/contracts/session/{contractId}.description: Retrieves the current session (edit or signing) for a contract.

GET /v1/contracts/signing-links/{documen.description: Returns direct signing URLs for each recipient of a contract document.

POST /v1/contracts/webhook/complete.description: Handles PandaDoc webhook when a contract is fully signed. Updates deal status and triggers downstream workflows.

POST /v1/esignatures/{dealId}.description: Creates a new PandaDoc e-signature document for a deal and initiates the signing workflow.
